creator: peter@flytrace.com
text:
I've just updated the ports tree in my repository after a successful build of all EFL-related ports using synth.
Now all these ports can be built correctly in a clean environment with a recent ports tree:
devel/efl
x11-wm/enlightenment
sysutils/evisum
multimedia/rage
x11/terminology
graphics/ephoto
editors/ecrire

Could someone commit the ports, please?
If I should do something more to get it completed - please, let me know.
